column1: # How many probe steps do we need for a reliable fork decision?
# If 5 steps suffices, we save 10/15/25 x 2 branches of overhead per gate = bigger budget for
# 4 runs x 300 steps x ~45 min = ~3 hrs. Tests PROBE_STEPS in {5, 10, 20, 30}.

column2: TIMEOUT_SECS=3600 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=3000 QK_GAIN_INIT=5.5 WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.64 TTT_ENABLED=1 SLIDING_WINDOW_ENABLED=1 TTT_EPOCHS=1 EMA_DECAY=0.995 LOGIT_SOFTCAP=1000 SCALAR_LR=0.030 MATRIX_LR=0.040 TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=32768 TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=1024 ITERATIONS=180 VAL_LOSS_EVERY=60 SEED=1337 LOOP_GATE_MODE=fork LOOP_FORK_PROBE_STEPS=5 ENABLE_LOOPING_AT=0.35 DECISIONS_MD_PATH=logs/decisions_nano_s10_probe_5.md VAL_BATCH_TOKENS=8192 EVAL_SEQ_LEN=512 MAX_VAL_TOKENS=500000
